productDisplayName: Vans Men E-Street Blue Casual Shoes
description: The easiest shoe to wear with any casual outfit, this denim shoe from vans will be your daily wear staple. The distressed denim fabric contrasts with the bright white laces and rubber outsole in this lightweight and comfortable shoe. Upper Fabric upper for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
